sn35.171:1.1: "Bhikkhus, you should abandon desire for whatever is suffering … . You should abandon lust for whatever is suffering … . You should abandon desire and lust for whatever is suffering. And what is suffering? The eye is suffering … The mind is suffering; you should abandon desire and lust for it. sn.iv.150 Bhikkhus, you should abandon desire and lust for whatever is suffering."
